description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 10/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review process ownership docs for direct supervision, session-scoped runtime,
  and app-owned runtime.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Reviewed and tightened process ownership docs. README now separates module-target convenience, direct supervision, session-scoped runtime addressing, and app-owned runtime graduation. Public docs mention when to use module, PID/id, or session targets. Added the pipe-friendly Jidoka.session/3 helper used by the README and covered it in tests.
